title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Donate One (1) Unit Foton 6 Wheeler Dump Truck to Barangay Lalakay Purchased by the Municipal Government Thru Cost Sharing Scheme, the Municipal Share Chargeable Against the 20% Municipal Development Fund Continuing Appropriation Cy 2021 Amounting to Seven Hundred Fifty Thousand (P 750,000.00) and Ratifying the Same After.
